# Interface: JobsSpecification\<DatabaseKey\>

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:165](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L165)

The `jobs` facet — job chain entry handed out by `specification.jobs()`.
Jobs run in-process by definition (CONVENTIONS A5/A8).

| Type Parameter | Default type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `DatabaseKey` *extends* `string` | `string` |
